model: bartowski/zai-org_GLM-4.5-Air-GGUF IQ4_XS (60.81 GB on disk; 2 shards, 57 GB total)

comparison_in_vram.model: Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B-Q4_K_M (18 GB, fits fully in VRAM)

verdict: Selective MoE expert offload via -ot pattern works correctly but is ~700x slower than an in-VRAM model on this hardware, because expert weights page from SSD on every token. Not usable for any interactive workflow at IQ4_XS on 46 GB RAM. Smaller quants (IQ3_XS 50.84 GB, Q3_K_S 53.42 GB) would still exceed the RAM-headroom budget once OS + KV are accounted for, so they would not change the conclusion materially. The ~256 GB RAM floor noted in the plan stands.
